en.extract:
Kordofan lark (Mirafra cordofanica) is a species of lark in the family Alaudidae found in Africa.


Taxonomy and systematics
Alternate names for the Kordofan lark include golden lark, Kordofan bush lark and Kordofan singing bushlark.


Distribution and habitat
The Kordofan lark has a large range that spans the continent from Mauritania and Senegal to Niger, eastern Chad, southern Sudan and northern South Sudan.  Its global extent of occurrence is estimated at 1,900,000 km2.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry shrubland and subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland.

'''Kordofan lark''' ('''''Mirafra cordofanica''''') is a species of [[lark]] in the family [[Alaudidae]] found in Africa.

==Taxonomy and systematics==
Alternate names for the Kordofan lark include '''golden lark''', '''Kordofan bush lark''' and '''Kordofan singing bushlark'''.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?avibaseid=67F96AABBD051483|title=Mirafra cordofanica - Avibase|website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org|access-date=2016-12-10}}</ref>

== Distribution and habitat ==
The Kordofan lark has a large [[range (biology)|range]] that spans the continent from Mauritania and Senegal to Niger, eastern Chad, southern Sudan and northern South Sudan.  Its global extent of occurrence is estimated at 1,900,000 km<sup>2</sup>.<ref name=BL>{{cite web |url=http://www.birdlife.org/datazone/species/index.html?action=SpcHTMDetails.asp&sid=8098&m=0 |title=''Kordofan Lark - BirdLife Species Factsheet'' |author=Compilers Stuart Butchart |author2=Jonathan Ekstrom |work=Evaluators: Jeremy Bird, Stuart Butchart |publisher=[[BirdLife International]] |year=2008 |access-date=May 11, 2009}}</ref>

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry [[shrubland]] and subtropical or tropical dry lowland [[grassland]].

zh.extract:
金歌百灵（学名：Mirafra cordofanica），是百灵科歌百灵属的一种，分布于马里、尼日尔、毛里塔尼亚、苏丹、布基纳法索、塞内加尔和乍得。全球活动范围约为1,880,000平方千米。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
金歌百灵的栖息地包括亚热带或热带的（低地）干草原和亚热带或热带的（低地）干燥疏灌丛。
